title: Evaluate Bubble Tea v2 vs custom Rust TUI for ion
description: Research Bubble Tea v2 inline/composer/runtime model, compare against ion's custom Rust TUI issues, and produce an architecture decision doc covering all-Go vs custom Rust TUI.

logs.msg: Created durable research note ai/research/bubbletea-v2-vs-rust-tui-host-2026-03-12.md capturing current Bubble Tea v2 facts, ACP library support, ion-local TUI failure modes, and the live option set (all Go vs Go host + Rust core vs continued custom Rust TUI).
